texts.content:
From: Oceanview Travel Agency
To: Ms. Patricia Chen
Subject: Booking Confirmation – Tokyo Trip

Your flight has been confirmed:
Flight OV184 – Departure: March 14 at 11:45 AM from Gate 22
Seat: 14A (window, extra legroom)

Please arrive at least 90 minutes before domestic flights and 120 minutes before international flights.

Online check-in opens 24 hours before departure. Baggage allowance: one carry-on (max 7 kg) and one checked bag (max 23 kg).

Hotel Sakura – Guest Policies

Check-in: 3:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
Early check-in available for a fee of $30 before 12:00 PM.

Breakfast is complimentary and served 6:30–10:00 AM in the Garden Restaurant.

Please note: All rooms are non-smoking. A cleaning fee of $150 will be charged for violations.

questions.stem: What is Patricia Chen's seat assignment?
options: A. 14B (aisle)
B. 12A (window)
C. 14A (window, extra legroom)
D. 22A (extra legroom)
questions.explanation: The email confirms seat 14A with window and extra legroom.

questions.stem: When can Patricia check in online for her flight?
options: A. Immediately after booking
B. 48 hours before departure
C. 24 hours before departure
D. At the airport only
questions.explanation: The email states that 'online check-in opens 24 hours before departure.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the hotel's smoking policy?
options: A. Smoking is permitted on balconies only
B. Smoking is allowed in designated rooms
C. The hotel imposes a financial penalty for smoking in rooms
D. Guests may smoke in the Garden Restaurant
questions.explanation: The notice states that rooms are non-smoking and a $150 cleaning fee will be charged for violations.

questions.stem: What is the purpose of the travel agency email?
options: A. To offer a flight upgrade
B. To confirm booking details and provide instructions
C. To request payment for the trip
D. To announce a flight cancellation
questions.explanation: The email confirms the flight, seat, gate, and provides check-in and baggage information.

questions.stem: If Patricia wants to check into her hotel at 11:00 AM, what will happen?
options: A. She can check in for free
B. She must wait until 3:00 PM
C. She can check in early for an additional fee
D. She will receive a complimentary breakfast voucher
questions.explanation: Standard check-in is 3:00 PM, but early check-in is available for $30 before 12:00 PM.

questions.stem: The word 'complimentary' in the hotel notice is closest in meaning to:
options: A. expensive
B. free of charge
C. optional
D. high quality
